overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a journey from a dark neon-lit urban path at night through a sunlit forested park into a bustling commercial plaza with large digital billboards and futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking through dark urban pathway illuminated by vertical cyan neon light posts

notable_agents.action: standing near neon light post wearing yellow jacket

entered.detail: tall cylindrical posts emitting bright cyan light lining the pathway
heaps of garbage bags and debris accumulated along the path edge
tall trees silhouetted against the dark urban background
dark reflective pavement surface with puddles and wet sheen

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, narrow urban pathway at night, illuminated by distinctive vertical cyan neon light posts. The ground is wet asphalt reflecting the neon glow, with trash piles visible on the right side. A lone NPC in a yellow jacket stands near one of the light posts as the camera moves forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forested park path with cobblestone walkway

events.description: abrupt transition from night darkness to bright daylight
forest path opens up revealing urban plaza and futuristic skyscrapers ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along sunlit cobblestone path winding through dense forested area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward camera along the forest path

entered.detail: tall dense trees with green foliage illuminated by bright sunlight
winding stone-paved walkway dappled with sunlight and shadows
massive boulders and rock outcroppings lining the right side of path
slender cyan light posts similar to urban ones but in park setting

segments.scene_description: Following an abrupt transition from night to bright daylight, the scene shifts to a sunlit forest path with cobblestone paving. Tall trees create a canopy overhead while large rock formations line the right side. The path gradually opens up to reveal futuristic urban structures in the distance as pedestrians appear walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with stairs and massive digital billboards

events.description: begin ascending wide concrete staircase through the plaza
passing large Sweet Clean Speed 2 advertisement billboard on the left

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs through commercial plaza surrounded by pedestrians and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt ascending the stairs ahead
person sitting on stairs using mobile phone

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway and platform area with benches
wide concrete staircase leading up through the plaza levels
massive glowing advertisement screens covering building facades
large colorful advertisement for Sweet Clean Speed 2 featuring weapon graphics
tall palm trees in raised planters along the plaza edge
towering modern glass and steel buildings with geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban plaza with wooden decking, transitioning to a broad concrete staircase ascending through the space. Massive digital billboards and advertisements cover the surrounding futuristic skyscrapers, including a prominent Sweet Clean Speed 2 billboard. Palm trees and other pedestrians populate the area as the camera climbs the stairs toward the upper plaza level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dark, neon-lit urban alleyway into a bright, futuristic commercial plaza. It begins on a narrow path of wet asphalt at night, moving past cyan neon light posts and trash piles toward a lone figure in a yellow jacket. As the environment abruptly shifts from night to bright daylight, the camera glides along a sunlit cobblestone forest path beneath a canopy of tall trees and rocky formations. The scene then opens from the greenery to reveal distant urban structures and approaching pedestrians before expanding into a wide plaza with wooden decking. Finally, the camera ascends a broad concrete staircase toward the upper level, surrounded by palm trees and massive digital billboards advertising Sweet Clean Speed 2 against a backdrop of futuristic skyscrapers.
